---
title: "Research"
description-meta: "{{< meta website.description >}}"
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing2.ejs
    categories: true
  - id: working-papers
    contents: "working-papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing2.ejs
  - id: edited-books
    contents: "edited-books/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing2.ejs
  - id: book-chapters
    contents: "chapters/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing2.ejs
  - id: reviews
    contents: "reviews/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/research/listing2.ejs
page-layout: full
include-back-link: false
toc-location: right
---

My main research interests include public diplomacy, Korean foreign policy, power in worlds politics, and student mobility programs.

## Journal articles

::: {#articles}
:::

## Edited books

::: {#edited-books}
:::

## Book chapters

::: {#book-chapters}
:::

## Book reviews

::: {#reviews}
:::
